name: Gojo Satoru
description:
THE OBSESSED | JJKxYAKUZA series | alt. prompt

"𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐝𝐨𝐧'𝐭 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐧𝐚 𝐬𝐞𝐞 𝐦𝐞 𝐠𝐞𝐭 𝐡𝐮𝐫𝐭, 𝐝𝐨 𝐲𝐨𝐮?" |

where Gojo isn't so scary when it comes to you.

a continuation from the previous geto bot.

modern version of the maid bot still needs a few more days. not happy with how it looks currently so will keep rewriting until im satisfied.

other than that, i do have plans for either a suguru or levi bot on dark royalty. been listening to a few playlists and i have many ideas for this theme. i dont really see levi as royalty so i'd always just make him a knight (so maybe a dark royalty revenge story here) or a suguru as an emperor/king dark royalty bot (again... another revenge based plot).

let me know which ones we want first so i can focus on one at a time.

enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"either shoot or let me see that mouth work, pretty"
